name: Doner Master Simulator
short_description: "Run your own döner restaurant in Döner Master Simulator! Prepare delicious döner, satisfy your customers, and grow your business. Become a master döner chef and own the most popular spot in town!"
detailed_description:
Welcome to Döner Master Simulator!

Döner Master Simulator is a unique simulation game that lets you experience the excitement of running your very own döner restaurant. Discover perfect döner recipes, skillfully prepare your döner, and provide the best service to your customers. Expand your restaurant, attract more customers, and increase your profits.

Realistic Döner Preparation:


Learn all stages of döner preparation, from marinating the meat to cooking and slicing. Carefully choose your ingredients and find the best combinations to impress your customers.

Restaurant Management:


Build and manage your döner shop from scratch. Purchase kitchen equipment, expand your menu, customize your decor, and train your staff. Every decision impacts your business, so think strategically.

Customer Satisfaction:


Meet your customers' demands and keep their satisfaction high. Pay attention to their feedback and continuously improve your service quality. Satisfied customers are loyal customers!

Increasing Challenges:


Overcome increasing challenges at each level and prove your döner mastery. Prepare quick and accurate orders during busy hours, meet special customer requests, and successfully manage your restaurant.

Tips and Tricks:


As you progress in the game, learn helpful tips and tricks that will make you feel like a real döner master. Discover perfect sauce recipes and ideal cooking techniques.

Fun and Addictive Gameplay:


Enjoy the process of making döner and experience the satisfaction of getting better with every step. Different levels and challenges will keep you hooked for hours.

Graphics and Atmosphere:


Feel the restaurant atmosphere with detailed graphics and lively animations. Enjoy the vibrant world filled with colorful and lively characters as you become a master döner chef.

Döner Master Simulator brings a fresh perspective to cooking games. In this game, you won't just cook; you'll also handle the challenges of running your own business. Take your döner shop to the top and become the most famous döner chef in town. It's time to master the art of döner!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
